name: Mexican Layered"pizza
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces black beans, canned, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix corn, beans, tomatoes, chilies, onion, and spices in a bowl.
2. If time permits, allow flavors to blend.
3. Lightly spray two 9-inch cake pans with oil.
4. Place a tortilla in each pan and spoon about 1/6 of the vegetable mixture over it.
5. Sprinkle approximately 2 ounces grated cheese on top.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 twice more, using up most of the tortillas.
7. Top with remaining tortillas.
8. Bake in a 400-degree oven for about 15 minutes.
9. Let cool for 3-5 minutes, then invert onto plates.
10. Cut into wedges to serve.
